The '''''Bail Organa''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] (with [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]] added), a sister ship of the [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']] and the [[Elegos A'Kla (Imperial-class)|''Elegos A'Kla'']].

==History==
The vessel served as flagship of [[Fleet Group Two]], one of three major battle groups organized to defend [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. Under the command of [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], the ''Bail Organa'' and the ships it commanded went head-on into a massive [[Yuuzhan Vong]] fleet, losing virtually all of their ships in the battle.

After the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], Bel Iblis transferred command to the Mon Calamari Cruiser [[Harbinger (Mon Calamari Star Cruiser)|''Harbinger'']].

{{Ship-stub}}
